message:
feat(sdk): add Tauri-style invoke, events, channels, and fs APIs

New SDK features inspired by Tauri:
- invoke() with return values and command() for backend handlers
- emit()/listen() bidirectional event system
- channel() for streaming data
- window API (setSize, navigate, back, forward, reload)
- fs API (readFile, writeFile, readDir, stat, mkdir, remove)
- TypeScript definitions
- Browser-side SDK for page integration

files.patch:
@@ -1,8 +1,9 @@
 {
   "name": "termweb",
-  "version": "0.9.11",
+  "version": "0.9.12",
   "description": "Web browser in your terminal using Kitty graphics protocol. SDK for building terminal apps with web technologies.",
   "main": "./lib/index.js",
+  "types": "./lib/index.d.ts",
   "bin": {
     "termweb": "bin/termweb.js"
   },
